assumption_text: Use the contemporaneous 400,000 trapped-civilian figure as the Ghouta row's one-month civilian exposure proxy.
rationale: It is the clearest retained population figure tied to the selected month-long window.

assumption_text: Leave the Ghouta episode-total inflicting-side field null.
rationale: The retained monthly SNHR wording does not itself assign the whole 871-civilian toll to a single actor in a way this retrofit can quote directly.

assumption_text: Use the reported 3 million trapped civilians in Idlib as the spring-summer row's exposure proxy.
rationale: The retained source chain does not provide a better population-time series for the same window.

assumption_text: Encode 'at least 450 civilians had died' conservatively as 450.
rationale: This preserves a defensible floor without inventing a higher point estimate.
